chunks.text: Justine Sherry wins the 2016 ACM SIGCOMM Doctoral Dissertation Award - EECS at Berkeley CS alumna Justine Sherry (M.S. ’12/Ph.D. ’16 advisor: Sylvia Ratnasamy) has won the ACM SIGCOMM Doctoral Dissertation Award for Outstanding PhD Thesis in Computer Networking and Data Communication. Justine’s thesis was on “Middleboxes as a Cloud Service,” and brought the benefits of cloud computing to the networking domain. Justine is now assistant professor at the Carnegie Mellon School of Computer Science. Categories Alumni Honors Research View Open Faculty Positions
